infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow Ark to protect your offline vault with Face ID.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Allow Ark to use motion sensors for compass, level, and survival tools.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Ark to save your position and offline map regions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Ark to record short voice prompts for offline transcription.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Ark to attach photos to saved map locations and Ask Arky chats.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Ark to choose photos for saved map locations and Ask Arky chats.
